---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new module, skill, or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What
Describe the feature or module.

## Why
What problem does it solve? Who benefits?

## Proposed structure
Where it fits in the blueprint:
- [ ] New spec module (`docs/specs/`)
- [ ] New skill (`.claude/skills/`)
- [ ] New agent (`.claude/agents/`)
- [ ] New command (`.claude/commands/`)
- [ ] Improvement to existing content
- [ ] Other

## Example content
Show what the file(s) would look like.

## Additional context
References, links, similar tools.
